patches.changes:

patches.original_hypothesis: The bug occurs because the method does not check if the types of the elements in array2 are compatible with the type of array1 when creating the joined array. This leads to an ArrayStoreException when trying to copy elements of incompatible types.

patches.hypothesis: The bug is caused by attempting to store elements of one type into an array of another type, leading to an ArrayStoreException. We need to check the component types of the input arrays and throw an IllegalArgumentException if they are incompatible.

The bug occurs because the method does not check if the component types of the two arrays are compatible before attempting to copy elements from one to the other. This leads to an ArrayStoreException when incompatible types are used.
